assertions.title: Import and export buttons have clear labels

steps.observed: App loaded with chain selector, from/to token inputs, and settings gear

steps.action: Click settings gear icon to open settings panel
steps.expected: Settings panel opens with tokenlist management
steps.observed: Settings modal opened showing Tokenlist Sources and Local Tokens sections
Button reads 'Import Tokenlist' (confirmed via snapshot: generic ref=e62 text 'Import Tokenlist')
Button reads 'Export Tokenlist' (confirmed via snapshot: button ref=e61 text 'Export Tokenlist')

evidence.consoleErrors: none (favicon.ico 404 only — cosmetic, ignored per guidance)

assertions.title: Trust warning visible in settings panel

steps.action: Check for trust warning in Tokenlist Sources section
steps.expected: Prominent warning about only using tokenlists from trusted sources, mentioning fake token addresses
steps.observed: Warning visible near top of Tokenlist Sources: bold '⚠️ Only load tokenlists from trusted sources.' followed by 'Malicious tokenlists can contain fake token addresses (e.g., a fake USDC) that could trick you into sending funds to scammers.'

steps.action: Verify warning is always visible (not dismissable)
steps.expected: Warning is always present when panel is open
steps.observed: Warning is a static element in the panel, no dismiss button — always visible

evidence.consoleErrors: none (favicon.ico 404 only — cosmetic, ignored per guidance)

assertions.title: Setting from token to same as to token triggers swap

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ with clean state
steps.expected: Form shows default tokens: From=USDC, To=WETH on Base chain

steps.action: Clear from field and type 'WETH' to trigger autocomplete
steps.observed: WETH autocomplete option appeared showing 'Wrapped Ether' and full address 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006

steps.action: Click WETH autocomplete option in from field
steps.expected: From becomes WETH, To swaps to USDC (old from value)

evidence.consoleErrors: none (favicon.ico 404 only — cosmetic, ignored per guidance)

assertions.title: Setting to token to same as from token triggers swap

steps.action: Starting state after VAL-SWAP-001: From=WETH, To=USDC
Clear to field and type 'WETH' to trigger autocomplete
steps.expected: WETH autocomplete option appears in to field
steps.observed: WETH autocomplete option appeared showing 'Wrapped Ether' and full address

steps.action: Click WETH autocomplete option in to field
steps.expected: To becomes WETH, From swaps to USDC (old to value)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-IO-006: Import/Export buttons correctly labeled 'Import Tokenlist' and 'Export Tokenlist'. VAL-TRUST-001: Trust warning prominently displayed in settings panel with bold text and risk explanation. VAL-SWAP-001: Setting from token to match to token correctly swaps both tokens. VAL-SWAP-002: Setting to token to match from token correctly swaps both tokens.
